title: NER API
description: Built a production-ready RESTful API using FastAPI for Named Entity Recognition, supporting both raw text input and .txt file uploads for entity extraction.

title: Regularization Path Explorer
description: Explored regularization techniques including Lasso and Ridge regression, visualizing how regularization paths affect model complexity and performance.

title: KPI Dashboard
description: Built an end-to-end KPI analytics dashboard for the Amman Digital Market by extracting data from PostgreSQL, defining business KPIs, and validating insights using statistical tests.

title: ML Learning Curves Diagnostic
description: Used scikit-learn’s learning_curve to diagnose high bias vs. high variance in a logistic regression model on the telecom churn dataset. Analyzed training and validation curves to evaluate whether more data or a more complex model would improve performance.

title: Mail Flow
description: Built a production-structured Python tool for sending, reading, and scheduling emails using the standard library and lightweight packages. Implemented secure credential management, logging, and modular design with SMTP and IMAP integration.

title: ML Evaluation Pipeline
description: Built a reproducible ML evaluation pipeline combining data splitting, preprocessing, cross-validation, and regularization. Compared multiple models on the telecom churn dataset and generated a business-grounded recommendation.

title: ETL Pipeline
description: Built an incremental ETL pipeline with change detection to extract, transform, and load data from PostgreSQL, with logging for reliability and traceability.

title: PyTorch Model
description: Implemented a neural network training loop in PyTorch, including data loading, forward/backward passes, and evaluation metrics.

title: Data Pipeline
description: Built an end-to-end data loading and preprocessing pipeline using pandas, with validation checks and reproducible outputs.

title: Descriptive Analytics
description: Performed exploratory data analysis on a university student performance dataset, including data cleaning, distribution analysis, correlation studies, and hypothesis testing.

title: Regression & Evaluation
description: Built and evaluated regression models with a focus on model selection, performance metrics, and interpreting results.

title: SQL Murder Mystery
description: Solved a fictional murder case using SQL by querying a relational database, exploring multiple tables, and connecting clues using joins and conditional logic.

title: Environment & Git Workflows
description: Set up a reproducible Python development environment and practiced branching, merging, and pull request workflows.

title: Trees & Ensembles
description: Built Decision Tree and Random Forest models for customer churn prediction on an imbalanced dataset, evaluating performance using PR-AUC and calibration metrics. Demonstrated how tree-based models capture non-linear feature interactions that linear models miss.

title: Hyperparameter Tuning & Nested Cross-Validation
description: Applied GridSearchCV and nested cross-validation on Decision Trees and Random Forests to evaluate hyperparameter tuning bias. Showed how inner-CV performance overestimates real performance and quantified the selection gap between models.

title: Model Comparison & Decision Memo
description: Built a full model comparison pipeline evaluating linear and tree-based models for customer churn using 5-fold cross-validation, PR-AUC, and calibration metrics. Delivered a decision memo translating model performance into business tradeoffs for deployment.

title: From Notebook to Production Script
description: Refactored a full ML model comparison pipeline into a production-ready CLI tool using argparse and structured logging. Enabled configurable training, evaluation, and output generation with reproducible command-line execution.

title: Multilingual NER Pipeline with Rule-Based & Transformer Models
description: Built an end-to-end Named Entity Recognition pipeline using spaCy, Hugging Face transformers, and custom rules. Compared multilingual and English-only models, evaluated performance against gold labels, and enhanced extraction with domain-specific climate entities.

title: Entity Analysis Pipeline for Multilingual Climate Corpus
description: Built an end-to-end NER pipeline to extract, aggregate, and analyze entities from a multilingual climate dataset. Generated entity statistics, co-occurrence patterns, and visual insights across categories to uncover structured information from unstructured text.
